role: This directory aggregates high-level documentation views that define the system's external contract and surface critical maintenance risks.
responsibility: Combines a public API surface reference for developers and agents (CLI commands, MCP endpoints, exported modules) with a risk hotspot report that prioritizes files needing attention, enabling both human and automated stakeholders to understand the system's interface and identify areas of technical debt or fragility.

children.role: View document describing the public API surface of the ArchSpine system.
Risk Hotspots Report – identifies files with the highest risk factors in the codebase, providing a ranked list and detailed analysis to guide maintenance priorities.
